description: Catch of the Day sources around the world to bring you good value and great tasting fish you can trust. Our fish is responsibly sourced and produced with strict quality control measures so you can feel good serving it to your family. Wild Pacific Pink Salmon is a lean and mild-flavoured fish that is low in oil with a small flake that cooks up to a pale pink colour. The pink salmon fillets have no trans fat, are a source of omega-3 polyunsaturates and are excellent source of protein. Frozen Fish & Seafood Grocery
name: Catch Of The Day Wild Pacific Frozen Salmon Fillets 1.5 Lbs

description: Welcome to a fresh new world of possibilities! Your Fresh Market™ offers you a variety of delicious foods that are easy to prepare and even easier to enjoy. From deli meats and baked goods, to produce and home meal solutions, serving up fresh ideas and fantastic quality is our specialty. When it’s seafood night, reach for Your Fresh Market™ Atlantic Salmon Portion. Simply season with a blend of herbs and spices, then toss on the BBQ or the oven; it cooks to perfection in no time. Deliciously moist and flaky, it pairs well with salads, a bed of rice, or a medley of steamed veggies. Just add a squeeze of lemon to make the flavours sing. Salmon & Fish Grocery

description: You shouldn’t be the only one eating foods with ingredients you love. Like you, we love our pets and care about their health. That’s why we made Mini-PureSnacks training treats; made with the same carefully selected simple ingredients that you’d find at your local grocery store. We’ve got nothing to hide. Our freeze dried mini salmon training treats have just 1 human grade ingredient: wild-caught sockeye salmon. We take RAW salmon and gently freeze dry it for up to 24 hours. The result is a “pure snack” that’s been specially cut into small pieces for training or small dogs, with unbeatable nutrition, that smells fantastic and tastes even better. Born in 2005, we’re a proud Canadian company treating and feeding millions of dogs and cats every year since. Training Dog Treats Pets

description: Pour a purr-worthy dish full of yum with Purina Friskies Seafood Sensations dry cat food. Salmon, tuna and shrimp flavours combine to create a taste they’ll love, and a touch of seaweed flavour balances out the recipe for delicious goodness. Essential vitamins and minerals in every serving let you feel good about offering this dry cat food to your feline friend, and the seafood flavours give them plenty of reasons to finish every last delectable bite. Each serving contains 100 percent complete and balanced nutrition for every stage of life, so your cat can enjoy this scrumptious recipe from their playful kitten days all the way through their adventurous adult years. Let the sound of the delightful bites hitting your cat’s bowl send them prancing your way and watch as they savour every bit of the ocean flavours. With so much goodness in every serving, your cat is sure to meow for more at mealtime. Dry Cat Food Pets

description: Catit Cuisine Mousse is an all-natural, complete meal your cat will enjoy from start to finish. Using real meat as key ingredient, this grain-free delight offers felines all the nutrition they need to live a full, happy life. Catit Cuisine Mousse is specially prepared for maximum preservation of nutrition and palatability, and its smooth, soft texture is also perfect for senior cats. Each little box of Catit Cuisine Mousse packs a generous amount of food — up to 25% more than cans, which contain 75g on average. Our Tetra Recart packagings are easy to open and reseal, so you can keep your cat’s favourite mousse in the refrigerator overnight for a second serving the next day. Made of 70% renewable FSC-certified paperboard, Tetra Recart packs are recyclable, and more energy-friendly to produce than other types of packaging. Wet Cat Food Pets

description: The Karem counter stools are a welcome addition to any chic dining space. The elegant but durable polyester fabric features a luxurious velvety finish for an inviting look and feel. Traditional tufted accents on the comfortably cushioned seat back are a handsome complement to the sophisticated and sturdy nail-head trim. A convenient chrome-plated pull handle on the back adds modern appeal and makes it easy to re-position this dining stool as needed. With its fashionable colour and dark wooden legs, this versatile chair fits seamlessly into any contemporary or traditional décor scheme. Group multiple Karem counter stools around a table or bar to create an elegant dining set or place them individually around your home as accent pieces or for extra seating when entertaining. Bar Stools & Counter Stools Furniture

description: DOM Specialty Smoked Steelhead Salmon is carefully sourced from the pristine, icy waters of the North Atlantic, ensuring a product that stands out for its superior quality, flavor, and nutritional value. Each fillet is smoked to perfection over fragrant hardwoods, a process rooted in time-honored Scandinavian traditions that enhance the salmon's natural richness. The result is a delectable, all-natural product with a bold, rich taste and velvety texture that appeals to gourmet palates. Available in prime condition, each piece maintains its freshness, making it perfect for any culinary creation. Frozen Fish & Seafood Grocery
name: Dom Specialty Frozen Smoked Steelhead Salmon 200g

description: DOM Specialty Smoked Atlantic Salmon is crafted from premium fish sourced from the pristine, icy waters of the North Atlantic. These ideal, cold conditions help ensure that each salmon is of outstanding quality, rich in both flavour and nutrients. Our artisanal smoking process uses carefully selected hardwoods and adheres to Scandinavian traditions passed down through generations. This meticulous approach creates a rich-tasting, all-natural salmon with a delicate, smoky flavour and buttery texture that makes it an exceptional addition to any meal, whether enjoyed on its own or as part of a gourmet dish.
name: Dom Specialty Frozen Smoked Atlantic Salmon 200g

description: 100% Wild Caught Clover Leaf WILD Sockeye Salmon is from the Pacific Ocean and is prized for its deep red colour, firm texture and rich flavour. Clover Leaf’s Sockeye Salmon is MSC certified, and packed solid style i.e. one large piece, and in its own juices for natural goodness. It is perfect in salads, sandwiches, casseroles, pies and spreads. *Our Wild caught Salmon is certified by the Marine Stewardship Council (MSC). This means that you are choosing certified sustainable seafood that’s wild caught through sustainable fishing methods from certified sustainable fisheries, guarding oceans from being overfished and protecting marine animals. Look for the blue fish MSC logo on our packaging. Voted Most Trusted Canned Seafood Brand based on the 2025 BrandSpark® Canadian Trust Study. Canned Fish & Seafood Grocery
name: Clover Leaf® Sockeye Salmon 213 G

description: Atlantic Salmon Skinless Boneless Original Made In Canada Part of the Global Aquaculture Alliance BAP (Best Aquaculture Practices) Certified 1.5% fund Aboriginal wild fishing initiatives 1.5% funds Aboriginal language revitalization 3% of annual sales is returned directly to aboriginal initiatives Authentic Aboriginal Seafood sustainably sourced in the Pacific Northwest First Nations owned seafood enterprise that operates on Vancouver Island’s pristine West Coast As our name on the packaging suggests, Gratitude is our mantra, our mission to honour and cherish evolutions life line, our way forward Sustainable and healthy approaches to feeding the world’s growing population are more critical now than ever before. As wild fisheries have reached their harvest capacity, aquaculture, or fish farming, is needed so that future generations can enjoy the seafood we do today. We ensure it’s done properly As our name on the packaging suggests, Gratitude is our mantra, our mission to honour and cherish evolution’s life line, our way forward. We are grateful for what nature has given us. This Canadian Atlantic Salmon is an extension of this time honoured belief, and a healthy reminder of this continued mission to deliver high quality seafood  using Indigenous approved fishing and production processes. Gratitude’s Canadian Atlantic Salmon represents more than a source of sustenance for our collective palates. When you make a purchase, you’re helping breathe new life not only in our community, but in yours, as well.
name: Gratitude Seafood Atlantic Salmon Skinless Boneless Original 150g - Canadian Owned and Sustainably Sourced

description: PouchSalmon Teriyaki Salmon Teriyaki Baby Food Pouch Introducing this Wild Caught Salmon Teriyaki baby food pouch which offers a taste of Japanese-inspired cuisine tailored to young palates, ensuring your little one gets nourishment from our organic ingredients while being introduced to global flavors in every bite. We've carefully blended wild-caught salmon baby food with organic sweet potatoes and purple carrots, all enveloped in a delightful teriyaki sauce made from premium coconut aminos and a touch of herbs and spices. A nutritious and flavorful choice for your baby's culinary journey! Inspired by flavors from Japan 5g protein to help build your baby's body 50mg of Omega-3s (a.k.a. powerhouse fat!)
name: Serenity Kids Organic Pouch Salmon Teriyaki 99g - Organic and Wild Caught
